description:
The quiz assesses familiarity with JavaScript's native Date API, challenging users to apply core date manipulation and formatting knowledge. It is moderately difficult, aiming to deepen understanding while maintaining an encouraging, informal teaching tone.
Topics: JavaScript Date class, Date parsing and formatting, Time zones and localization, Common pitfalls and best practices
Audience: Developers with basic JavaScript experience who want to improve their native date handling skills, especially those who usually rely on third‑party libraries.
